case_title: VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. DENNIS JARVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS, DENNIS , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-17-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-30-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-24-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-22-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
